sizing_rule.note: When calculating contract quantity from optimal f formula, always round DOWN rather than UP. The asymmetric cost of oversizing (beyond optimal) exceeds undersizing (below optimal). Implementation: floor(contracts_from_optimal_f) rather than ceil().

source_rule_text: Always round down rather than rounding up when calculating the number of contracts to trade, because the price of being slightly below optimal is less severe than the price of being slightly beyond optimal.
